title: Pablo Vice City sunset · trailer falso 18s
framework_applied: NARRATIVE-ARC-protocol-v1.md (4 pilares · wardrobe + motion + transitions + audio)
logline: Trailer falso 18s estilo Rockstar Games trailer reveal con Pablo Soul Character como protagonista en Vice City sunset. Acto 1 (0-5s) descubrimiento Pablo arriving beach con pastel pink Italian sport car hood open. Acto 2 (5-9s) acción · drift sport bike rolling burnout cyan smoke. Acto 3 (9-14s) climax cool · Pablo en yate sunset bow contemplating. Final beat (14-16s) close-up identity reveal con smile. Outro (16-18s) 'TODO HECHO CON · darkroomcreative.cloud'. La duda '¿es leak GTA VI o IA?' es el motor viral. Funnel: comments piden 'cómo lo hiciste' → DM auto envía ebook 'Cómo creé este video con IA' → CTA Dark Room 24,90€/mes.

references: Miami Vice 2006 (dir. Michael Mann · DP Dion Beebe · Sony F950 4K HD)
Trailer GTA VI dic 2023 oficial (Rockstar Games · 91M views 24h · benchmark engagement)
Inherent Vice 2014 (dir. Paul Thomas Anderson · DP Robert Elswit · 70s Florida-warm haze)
Drive 2011 (dir. Refn · DP Newton Thomas Sigel · neon synthwave)
Tenet 2020 (dir. Nolan · DP Hoyte van Hoytema · IMAX 65mm sunset Miami sequences)

lens_specs: Hero shots Pablo: Panavision Primo 35mm anamorphic 2x squeeze (Beebe Miami Vice signature · oval bokeh · horizontal lens flares)
Aperture: f/2.0-f/2.8 sunset golden hour ISO equivalent 200-400
Subtle film grain emulation 35mm Kodak Portra 400 push +1 hybrid digital
research.lut_reference: Vice City sunset pastel · saturation +18% on pink and teal channels selectively · highlights blown soft warm · blacks lifted +8 IRE · subsurface scattering on neon pastel signs · warm-cool split sun-side pink-orange / shadow-side teal-cyan · NO oversaturated MTV-80s
research_sources: American Cinematographer Aug 2006 · Beebe Miami Vice digital pioneer feature
American Cinematographer 2015 · Elswit Inherent Vice anamorphic feature
ASC Magazine 2020 · Hoyte van Hoytema Tenet IMAX feature
CONOCIMIENTO PROMPT IA.txt 2026 (Pablo personal · 6908 lines · 21 hallazgos including 360 Consistency Sheet master prompt)

sequence.narrative_arc: Single-day Vice City lifestyle arc · Pablo arrives in pastel pink sport car at sunset → starts moto for sunset ride drift → contemplates from luxury yacht bow → close-up identity reveal with subtle smile · all shot during same magic hour 5-6pm Miami latitude · single wardrobe entire piece

wardrobe_continuity.description: Pastel cream linen Hawaiian shirt unbuttoned over white tank top, light beige loose linen pants (rolled or fitted ankle), white leather sneakers, gold cuban-link chain visible on neck, premium aviator sunglasses worn pushed up on the forehead

lighting_continuity.time_of_day: sunset golden hour 5pm Miami latitude consistent throughout
lighting_continuity.single_sun_position: frame-right (sun-side casts pink-orange · shadow-side casts teal-cyan)

shots.structure_role: ACT 1 hook · Pablo arrival · pastel pink Italian sport car hood open · sunset golden hour · MAX wow factor
shots.subject_motion: Pablo's gaze shifts from looking at the open hood toward the camera over 1.2s · slight smirk emerges at the corner of mouth at 1.5s · right hand stays on hood static · weight shifts onto right leg at 2.5s confident posture · final 1.5s holds calm dominant gaze locked on viewer
shots.camera_motion: Steadicam stable wide three-quarter low-angle · very subtle 5% push-in over 4s from 4m distance to 3.8m · no shake · maintains rule-of-thirds framing (subject left two-thirds · sport car midground · Art Deco hotels upper-right bokeh)

Anamorphic oval bokeh visible en hotel background
WARDROBE COHERENCIA: Hawaiian shirt cream + tank top blanco + linen pants beige + sneakers blancos + gold chain + aviators on forehead
No faces visible besides Pablo
No readable text/logos en hoteles ni señales

shots.structure_role: ACT 2 build · Pablo on red sport bike rolling burnout drift · cyan smoke around rear wheel · kinetic action
shots.subject_motion: Pablo's right wrist twists throttle hard at 0.5s · body leans forward 10° at 1.0s · controlled rolling burnout begins at 1.5s with cyan smoke increasing · head tilts slightly toward camera at 2.5s with focused smirk holding through 4s
shots.camera_motion: Low-angle handheld kinetic with subtle natural sway · slight orbit around bike from frame-left toward frame-right over 4s (15° arc) · revealing more of the Vice City Art Deco neon backdrop progressively

shots.structure_role: ACT 3 climax cool · Pablo standing yacht bow · marina sunset · contemplative
shots.subject_motion: Pablo at yacht bow looking out at sunset · 0-2.5s holds three-quarter back-to-camera with breeze fluttering open linen shirt · 2.5-4s slowly turns head toward camera revealing profile · 4-5s holds profile calm gaze

transitions.ending_S1_frame: Pablo's hand starts lifting off sport car hood, head tilts off-camera left
transitions.opening_S2_frame: Match action: Pablo's same hand now grips motorbike handlebar, throttle wrist about to twist
transitions.audio_handoff: Distant sport bike rev starts at 3.0s of S1 (pre-cue) · dominates frame on S2 open with full burnout roar

transitions.ending_S2_frame: Cyan smoke fills frame in motion blur · whip pan motion continues
transitions.opening_S3_frame: Whip pan resolves into yacht bow medium · cyan-magenta sunset palette matches the smoke-magenta from S2
transitions.audio_handoff: Engine fade-out crossfaded with marina ambient water-lap over 0.4s · synthwave pad enters under

transitions.ending_S3_frame: Drone wide on yacht silhouette against sunset · subject turned profile to three-quarter facing right
transitions.opening_S4_frame: Match cut to close-up Pablo face · sunset bokeh background matches yacht's sunset · same eye-line
transitions.audio_handoff: Synthwave music drop coordinated with S4 open · last 0.3s of S3 builds anticipation with swell

caption_text:
Esto se filtró ayer.
Pero no es real. Lo hice yo.

Me pasé 3 horas haciendo que pareciera GTA VI.
¿Cuánto te tardó pensar que lo era?

Stack usado:
· Cinema Studio Video 3.0 + Seedance 2.0
· Soul Character entrenado (yo)
· Suno (música)
· ffmpeg (edición)

Coste real: ~$3.70

📩 Comenta "GTA" en este post y te mando el ebook con el proceso completo (gratis).

A Rockstar le toma 8 años hacer un juego.
A mí 3 horas hacer que parezca uno.
(Sí, faltan los gameplay loops. Y todo lo demás. Pero la VIBE está.)

Link en bio para acceder a las herramientas que uso.
